free_text: New results on proton-induced reactions on vanadium
for 47Sc production and the impact of level densities
foils were thus added in the stacked structure after
Monitor reaction for energies lower than 40 MeV.
Monitor reaction for energies higher than 40 MeV.
The uncertainty of the proton beam energy
was obtained considering the uncertainty of the beam
energy extracted from the cyclotron (about 500 keV)
and by calculating with the SRIM code the energy
straggling through each layer of the stacked target.
No information on source of uncertainties,
